name: Aditya Sharma
resume_text: Highly motivated Computer Science student with a strong foundation in modern web development. Experienced in building responsive user interfaces using React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Built a placement portal web application using Firebase Auth and Firestore. Developed real-time dashboard analytics and state management workflows. Proficient in frontend testing and deployment pipelines.

name: Priyanka Patel
resume_text: Backend developer and ML enthusiast. Specialized in building robust APIs with Python and FastAPI. Designed relational database schemas in PostgreSQL with efficient query performance. Deployed machine learning models using Docker and AWS. Actively contributing to open-source python packages. Solved over 500 algorithm problems on LeetCode.

name: Rohan Das
resume_text: Electronics student transitions to Software Engineering. Well-versed in Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles in Java and C++. Experience in developing backend microservices using Spring Boot and MySQL databases. Familiar with data structures and algorithms.

name: Sneha Reddy
resume_text: Final year CSE student focused on Artificial Intelligence and Natural Language Processing. Built semantic search engines using PyTorch and Sentence-Transformers. Created Named Entity Recognition pipelines for text extraction. Strong mathematical background in probability, statistics, and linear algebra. Developed dashboard components in Flask to showcase model outputs.

name: Vikram Singh
resume_text: Mechanical engineering student with an interest in software development and database analytics. Built basic web pages with HTML/CSS/JavaScript and wrote data analysis scripts using Python Pandas. Looking to transition into business analyst or junior developer positions.
